articles.title: Patriots might have shot at top free-agent receiver after Colts’ franchise-tag gamble
articles.description:
"He is a much more complete player than people give him credit for.”

The post Patriots might have shot at top free-agent receiver after Colts’ franchise-tag gamble appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots may pursue top free-agent receiver after Colts franchise-tagged Alec Pierce.
Alec Pierce is considered a complete player, enhancing the Patriots' receiving options.
This move could significantly strengthen the Patriots' offense for the upcoming season.

articles.title: Vermont postal worker allegedly threw away mail she was supposed to deliver for months
articles.description:
During a search of a dumpster where the worker allegedly discarded the mail, police found several packages and holiday cards.

The post Vermont postal worker allegedly threw away mail she was supposed to deliver for months appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Vermont postal worker discarded mail for months, impacting timely delivery to residents.
Police discovered multiple packages and holiday cards in a dumpster during the investigation.
Local residents may experience delays in receiving important mail and packages.

articles.title: Man in his 80s, dog dead in Foxborough fire
articles.description:
“Our hearts go out to the family that lost a loved one this morning,” said Foxborough’s Fire Chief Michael Kelleher. “This is a sad day for them and our community.”

The post Man in his 80s, dog dead in Foxborough fire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A fire in Foxborough resulted in the death of an elderly man and his dog.
The victim was a man in his 80s, confirmed by Fire Chief Michael Kelleher.
Community members mourn the loss, highlighting the tragedy's impact on local residents.

articles.title: Patriots players brought strippers, hookahs to celebrate at a Boston restaurant, its owner says. He’s now facing a license violation.
articles.description:
“There's a sense of entitlement that these players think they can do whatever they want, and that was the case.”

The post Patriots players brought strippers, hookahs to celebrate at a Boston restaurant, its owner says. He’s now facing a license violation. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots players celebrated at a Boston restaurant with strippers and hookahs.
Restaurant owner faces a license violation due to the incident.
Local residents express concern over players' behavior and its implications for community standards.

articles.title: Mass. students place No. 1 nationwide for AP scores, break all-time record
articles.description:
Advanced Placement exams have become more accessible than ever, making it possible for more students to earn college credit.

The post Mass. students place No. 1 nationwide for AP scores, break all-time record appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts students achieved the highest AP exam scores in the nation.
Over 30% of high school students took AP exams, a record high.
Increased AP participation may enhance college readiness for Boston students.
